title: IntelFinder
description: The IntelFinder connector integrates with the IntelFinder digital risk monitoring platform and imports its alerts into OpenCTI as Incidents. Applicable STIX entities (domains, IPs, credentials, URLs) are extracted from each alert and linked to the parent Incident, enabling analysts to track brand exposure, data leaks, and underground activity within OpenCTI.
short_description: Imports IntelFinder digital risk alerts into OpenCTI as Incidents with linked STIX observables for brand exposure and underground monitoring.
